# Task: Recipe validation: line numbers + device-reference checks

> Task ID: EMBER-S01-T02
> Sprint: [EMBER-S01](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: M

## Description

Extend check/--validate to report YAML syntax errors with line numbers and to validate that every device referenced by rules (when/then/unless) is declared in the devices map. dsl.Parse currently validates only the recipe name — an unknown device reference parses clean and fails silently at runtime.
